title: smartbuildLib
description: Library for Improved construction system (Now supports Create Aero)
body:
_Hello, everyone. First of all, I strongly recommend that you download projects through the official curseforge and modrinth launchers—this will increase the reward for the creators. Thank you all very much for your support!!!_

[![chat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7ba56bdea313f30d12390daaabdd4d5e3893385.webp)](https://discord.gg/s8vZR4PGr2)  [![chat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52c207f69601eccbc73c2502cf7e0c666d3bb793.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/smartbuildlib)

**This is a library mod whose task is to select a specific area with a mouse click and save it for further manipulation.The mod is intended to be used only as an API for other modifications, it no longer performs any other functions.**

## Dependence: This mod is required for the [Smartbuild](https://modrinth.com/mod/smartbuild) mod to function.


Most functions have been significantly redesigned:
1. There is no default button; to activate selection mode, you must first go to the menu, control settings, and assign a key.
2. Four selection modes have been added:
First mode - "1D"

![sup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf070081400d6a7e63aafa006e6731629024c316_0.webp) ![sup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0a337e12f691f215426f176ed5b1de6011e039f_0.webp)

Second mode - 2D

![sup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29f799b53718b51c74e51db418e4434d28298a1d_0.webp)
![sup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a8b34212374fc4562682539a1b8cf8330a145e2_0.webp)
![sup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21e3927b71bf4da64abc21d4d87ff93cb7e441dc_0.webp)

Third mode - 3D 

![sup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93e5cac25d0247af3ab02f69284b9a34a480774b_0.webp)
![sup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a6e704acdfc1a1b4992718202c8df98e5c241a1_0.webp)

Fourth  mode - 3D Openbox (available only starting with version Smart Build Lib 2.2.0)

![sup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53904cea9b5887d6bc647925be606b27fe0eaf14_0.webp)
![sup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b6ca19a7231b494f0d4d13538a55f824928b797_0.webp)


[![sup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be430e7f950991c85de23828c5efe38f082a33c8.webp)](https://ko-fi.com/iyouroverlord!)
